options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

commands.name: tlbexport
commands.description: Export the assembly to the specified type library

options.name: --out
options.description: File name of type library to be produced

options.name: --tlbreference
options.description: Type library used to resolve references [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --tlbrefpath
options.description: Path used to resolve referenced type libraries [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --asmpath
options.description: Look for assembly references here [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --silent
options.description: Suppresses all output except for errors [default: False]

options.name: --silence
options.description: Suppresses output for the given warning (Can not be used with /silent) [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Detailed log output [default: False]

options.name: --names
options.description: A file in which each line specifies the capitalization of a name in the type library. [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --overridename
options.description: Overwrites the library name

options.name: --overridetlbid
options.description: Overwrites the library id

options.name: --createmissingdependenttlbs
options.description: Generate missing type libraries for referenced assemblies. (default true)

options.name: --embed
options.description: Embeds type library into the assembly. (default: false) [default: �]

options.name: --index
options.description: If the switch --embed is specified, the index indicates the resource ID to be used for the embedded type library. Must be a number between 1 and 65535. Ignored if --embed not present. (default 1) [default: 1]

arguments.name: Assembly
arguments.description: File name of assembly to parse

options.name: --out
options.description: File name of the output

options.name: --tlbreference
options.description: Type library used to resolve references [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --tlbrefpath
options.description: Path used to resolve referenced type libraries [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --filterregex
options.description: Regex to filter the output [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --foruser
options.description: Registered for use only by the calling user identity. [default: False]

options.name: --foruser
options.description: Registered for use only by the calling user identity. [default: False]

commands.name: tlbembed
commands.description: Embeds a source type library into a target file

options.name: --index
options.description: Index to use for resource ID for the type library. If omitted, defaults to 1. Must be a positive integer from 1 to 65535. [default: 1]

arguments.name: TargetAssembly
arguments.description: File name of target assembly to receive the type library as a resource

options.name: --asmpath
options.description: Look for assembly references here [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --tlbrefpath
options.description: Look for type library references here [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --tlb
options.description: Will create and register a typelibrary for the given assembly [default: False]

options.name: --codebase
options.description: Will register the assembly with codebase [default: False]

options.name: --regfile
options.description: Will generate a registry entry text file (.reg) for the assembly instead of editing the registry directly

options.name: --codebaseroot
options.description: Specify a relative path on a target machine that will contain both the COM host and target assembly. Only affects behavior of --regfile.

options.name: --unregister
options.description: Will unregister the assembly [default: False]

arguments.name: TargetAssembly
arguments.description: File name of target assembly to receive the type library as a resource
